full_text:
Yue Xiang (Wenzai)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yue Xiang, styledWenzai, was born in Hedong. One of the seven Confucian Exemplars. Recorded Xie Gai’s expertise, students flocked to him. Yue Xiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
